name: Chocolate Nougatines
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, honey, and water in a saucepan.
2. Stir occasionally until the mixture reaches a boil.
3. Boil to hard ball stage (265 - 270 F).
4. In a separate bowl, add salt to egg whites and beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Gradually pour half of the hot syrup into the beaten eggs, beating constantly with an electric mixer or spoon.
6. Pour remaining syrup into the mixture, continuing to beat constantly.
7. Place the saucepan over low heat on an asbestos mat.
8. Beat until thick, then add vanilla and chopped nuts.
9. Pour the mixture into well-buttered shallow pans.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
11. Coat the cooled nougatines with melted chocolate.
